docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: How to have one resource with different schedules
docs.text:
• One resource with two different classes of users: ordinary and advanced users.
  • Ordinary users can only book the resource Mon to Fri 10:00 to 16:00.
  • Advanced users can additionally book the resource Mon to Fri 18:00 to 23:00 and Sat/Sun 09:00 to 23:00

docs.title: Download booked scheduler
docs.text:
• v2.8.5 from Twinkle Toes Software - Supports php7, mysql8. Does not work with php8.

  • Open source version from Github. As of 2023-08-01, the latest version is 2.8.6 which supports PHP8

docs.title: Notes on timetabling
docs.text:
• Convert .docx file from Denny to Excel: How? Which script?
    • Delete any 'carriage returns' in the titles/topics in the .docx file
    • Paste into Excel
    • Unmerged cells, so one line one entry
    • Add last column with course code
    • Example of the text file for processing by python script:
Ref Date Day Time Venue Topic Lecturer Code L1 2023-09-04 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Cartilage and bone connective tissue Yang-J BMSN3605 L2 2023-09-04 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Skull, vertebral column and back muscles Yang-J BMSN3605 L3 2023-09-05 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Appendicular skeleton Cheung-L BMSN3605 L4 2023-09-05 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Appendicular muscles Cheung-L BMSN3605 L5 2023-09-07 Thu 1030-1120 TBC Limb plexus Cheung-L BMSN3605 L6 2023-09-07 Thu 1130-1220 TBC Muscles of the head & face Cecot-TS BMSN3605 R1 2023-09-11 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Cheung-L BMSN3605 R2 2023-09-11 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Yang-J BMSN3605 L7 2023-09-12 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Synaptic & neuromuscular transmission Ma-CW BMSN3605 L8 2023-09-12 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Excitation & muscle contraction Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-14 Thu 1030-1220 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group A) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Yang-J BMSN3605 Fonseca-G BMSN3605 Lee-JCD BMSN3605 L9 2023-09-18 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Reflex physiology Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-18 Mon 1430-1620 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group B) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Cheung-L BMSN3605 Cecot-TS BMSN3605 Liu-R BMSN3605

docs.title: Extract weekday from date
docs.text:
=TEXT(DATE(2023,8,31),"ddd") -> Thu
=TEXT(A2,"ddd") -> Thu (A2 the excel cell with a date entry)

docs.title: check whether cell contains partial text match to another cell
docs.text:
=IF(COUNTIF(range,criteria),[value_if_true],[value_if_false])
=IF(COUNTIF(M2,"*"&K2&"*"),"clash","")

docs.title: RockyLinux in Hyper-V
docs.text: Aim: Use Rocky Linux as replacement for CentOS

docs.title: Comment lines
docs.text:
• Method 1: Put comments within <!--- ---> (three dashes) 

    * Point 1: Text
<!--- 
This is the comment section.
--->

* Point 2:

  • Point 1: Text

  • Point 2:

Warning

The comments will not appear in the html output but still visible in html page source

  • Method 2: Put comments within square brackets, followed by a colon, a space and a # sign. 

    * Point 1: Text
[This is the comment section]: #

* Point 2:

  • Point 1: Text

  • Point 2:

Note

The comments will not appear in the html output and not visible in html page source

  • Method 3: 
    [//]: # (This is the comment section)
[//]: # "This is the comment section"

docs.title: How to add additional sections e.g. blog?
docs.text:
CREATE TABLE new_table LIKE original_table;
create folders: /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/controllers /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/controllers/admin /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/entity /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/views

cp modules/news/controllers/News.php modules/blog/controllers/News.php cp modules/news/controllers/Event.php modules/blog/controllers/Blog.php Edit

cp modules/news/controllers/admin/Event.php modules/blog/controllers/admin/Blog.php Edit

cp modules/news/entity/event.php modules/blog/entity/blog.php Edit

cp modules/news/entity/event.yaml modules/blog/entity/blog.yaml Edit

cp modules/news/views/news_detail.twig modules/blog/views/news_detail.twig cp modules/news/views/news_index.twig modules/blog/views/news_index.twig

/home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/Blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/admin/Blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/entity/blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/entityblog.yaml

edit: /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/config/routes.php 

$route['(blog)(/.*)?'] = "news/$1/router$2";
e.g. blog/ok: $1 = blog; $2 = ok html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/Blog.php

add: $route['admin/(blog)(/.)?'] = 'blog/admin/$1$2'; $route['(blog)(/.)?'] = "blog/$1/router$2";

Means:

docs.title: How to add additional small promotion banners
docs.text:
Answer

  1. Edit theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.php

    • add the following lines: 
      'section_small_promotion_2' => 
    array (
        'caption' => 'Small Promotion Banner 2',
        'type' => 'section',
    ),
    'small_promotion_2' => 
        array (
            'caption' => 'Small Promotion Banner 2',
            'type' => 'group',
            'multiple' => true,
            'children' => 
                array (
                    'image' => 
                        array (
                            'caption' => 'Image',
                            'type' => 'file',
                            'resize' => '332c89',
                            'require' => true,
                            'dimension' => 
                                array (
                                    0 => 664,
                                    1 => 178,
                                ),
                        ),
                    'alt_text' => 
                        array (
                            'caption' => 'Alt Text',
                            'type' => 'text',
                            'require' => true,
                        ),
                    'link' => 
                        array (
                            'caption' => 'Link',
                            'type' => 'link',
                            'entity' => '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}',
                        ),
                ),
        ),

  2. Edit theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.yaml

    • Add the following:

    section_small_promotion_2:
    caption: Small Promotion Banner 2
    type: section
small_promotion:
    caption: Small Promotion Banner 2
    type: group
    multiple: true
    children:
        image:
            caption: Image 
            type: file
            resize: "332c89"
            require: true
            dimension: [ 664, 178 ]
        alt_text:
            caption: Alt Text
            type: text
            require: true
        link:
            caption: Link
            type: link
            entity: '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}'
3. Edit theorigo/application/modules/main/views/index.twig * Add the following: 
{%  set link = item['small_promotion_2']  %}
{%  if option_group_is_not_empty(link)  %}
<div>
    {% for i in range(0, grp_count(link)-1) %}
    <div class="promo__item slider-item">
        <a{{ link['link_href_target'][i] | raw }}><img class="promo__item-img"{{ link['image_src_alt_2x'][i] | raw }}></a>
        <span class="sr-only">{{ _('promotion')  }}</span>
    </div>
    {%  endfor  %}
</div>
{%  endif  %}
4. Need to edit CSS

docs.title: How to add additional highlighted items?
docs.text:
Original: 4 highlighted items in 1 row:

New: 5 highlighted items in 1 row

Answer

  1. Edit structure of mysql table: frontpage_data:

    • Add columns hl_image_5 and hl_title_5:

      ALTER TABLE frontpage_data
    ADD hl_image_5 varchar(255) NULL
        AFTER hl_title_4,
    ADD hl_title_5 varchar(255) NULL
        AFTER hl_image_5;

    • Result:

  2. Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/controllers/Main.php

    Under 

    public function filter_frontpage($item){
    * change: 
    for($i=1; $i<=4; $i++){
    $this->to_href_target($item['hl_link_'.$i], 'link');
    $this->to_src_alt_2x($item, $oid, 'hl_image_'.$i, 'hl_title_'.$i, $size['hl']);
}
    * to: 
    for($i=1; $i<=5; $i++){
    $this->to_href_target($item['hl_link_'.$i], 'link');
    $this->to_src_alt_2x($item, $oid, 'hl_image_'.$i, 'hl_title_'.$i, $size['hl']);
}

  3. Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.php

    • Add the following after section_hl_4
    'section_hl_5' => 
array (
    'caption' => 'Highlight Box 5',
    'type' => 'section',
),
'hl_image_5' => 
array (
    'caption' => 'Image',
    'type' => 'file',
    'resize' => '363c229',
    'require' => true,
    'dimension' => 
    array (
        0 => 726,
        1 => 458,
    ),
),
'hl_title_5' => 
array (
    'caption' => 'Title',
    'type' => 'text',
    'hidden' => false,
    'require' => true,
),
'hl_link_5' => 
array (
    'caption' => 'Link',
    'type' => 'group',
    'multiple' => true,
    'children' => 
    array (
        'title' => 
        array (
            'caption' => 'Title',
            'type' => 'text',
            'require' => true,
        ),
        'link' => 
        array (
            'caption' => 'Link',
            'type' => 'link',
            'entity' => '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}',
        ),
    ),
),

  4. Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.yaml

    • Add the following after section_hl_4 
      section_hl_5:
    caption: Highlight Box 4
    type: section
hl_image_5:
    caption: Image 
    type: file
    resize: "363c229"
    require: true
    dimension: [ 726, 458 ]
hl_title_5:
    caption: Title
    type: text
    hidden: false
    require: true
hl_link_5:
    caption: Link 
    type: group
    multiple: true
    children:
        title:
            caption: Title 
            type: text
            require: true
        link:
            caption: Link
            type: link
            entity: '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}'
    • Result:

    Highlight box 5 created:

  5. Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/views/index.twig.

    • Change: 
          {% for j in range(1, 4) %}
    <div class="card__item card-main__item" tabindex="0">
        <figure class="card__item-fig card-main__item-fig">
    • To: 
          {% for j in range(1, 5) %}
    <div class="card__item card-main__item" tabindex="0">
        <figure class="card__item-fig card-main__item-fig">
  6. Edit html/writables/min/css/projectbase.css 
    @media screen and (max-width: 767px)
.card-main__item {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0 0 25px;
}

@media (max-width: 991px)
.card-main__item {
    width: calc((100% - 60px)/3); /* change from /2 to /3 */
    margin: 5px; /* change from 15px to 5px */
}
@media (max-width: 1599px)
.card-main__item {
    width: calc((100% - 63px)/5); /* change from /4 to /5 */
    margin-right: 15px; /* change from 21px to 15px */
}
.card-main__item {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1001;
    width: calc((100% - 90px)/5); /* change from /4 to /5 */
    margin: 0 15px 0 0; /* change from 30px to 15px */
}
